zh.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall於大約1608年出生在英國。她於1628年與William Reed在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1647年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利且於1656年住在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。她去世於1690年6月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年83歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall于大约1608年出生在英国。她于1628年与William Reed在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1647年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利且于1656年住在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。她去世于1690年6月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年83岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本。

nameMeanings.name: Kendall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kendal in Cumbria, which takes its name from the river Kent + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’, or from the valley of the river Kent itself.

English (of Welsh origin): from an Anglicized form of the Welsh personal name Cynddelw, which was borne by a famous 12th-century Welsh poet. It probably derives from a Celtic word meaning ‘exalted, high’ + delw ‘image, effigy’.

variants.name: Kindall
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of   Kendall  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kindle
meanings: English: variant of   Kendall  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kindell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name formed with the placename element kind- ‘family, tribe’ + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall was born about 1608, in England. She married William Reed in 1628, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She lived in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1647 and Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England in 1656. She died on 15 June 1690, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 83, and was buried in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall est née environ 1608, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé William Reed en 1628, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle a vécu à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1647 et à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre en 1656. Elle est décédée le 15 juin 1690, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall wurde um 1608 in England geboren. Sie hat 1628 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England William Reed geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1647 hat sie in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1656 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England gelebt. Sie starb am 15. Juni 1690 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall è nata il circa 1608 nel England. Lei sposato William Reed nel 1628, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Vissuto a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1647 e nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England nel 1656. Morì il 15 giugno 1690, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendallは約1608年にイギリスで生まれた。1628年にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインでWilliam Reedと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1647年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーに，1656年にはイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインに住んでいた。彼女は1690年6月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで83歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall(은)는 대략 1608년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1628년 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 William Reed(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1647년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서, 1656년도에 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 살았다. 그녀는 1690년 6월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall nasceu aproximadamente 1608, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com William Reed em 1628, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela viveu em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1647 e em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra em 1656. Ela faleceu em 15 de junho de 1690, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall родилась около 1608 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Reed в 1628 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она жила в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1647 году и в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия в 1656 году. Она умерла 15 июня 1690 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Mabel Kendall nació aproximadamente 1608, en Inglaterra. Se casó con William Reed en 1628, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1647 y en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra en 1656. Murió el 15 de junio de 1690, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

th.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: นิวแคสตล อูพน ไทน, เนอร์ทอูมเบรแลนด์, เอิงแลนด์
th.Forest Hall, Northumberland, England, Un: โฟเรสต ฮัลล์, เนอร์ทอูมเบรแลนด์, อังกฤษ, สหราชอาณาจักร
th.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: โรกซบอูรี, ซ็อูฟอลก, แมสซาชอูสเอตส แบย โกโลนี, บริตอิช โกโลนิาล อาเมริแค
th.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: วอบอูรน, มิดดลส์เอกซ์, แมสซาชอูสเอตส แบย โกโลนี, บริตอิช โกโลนิาล อาเมริแค
th.Province of Massachusetts Bay, British C: แมสซาชอูสเอตส แบย โกโลนี, บริตอิช โกโลนิาล อาเมริแค
th.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: วอบอูรน, มิดดลส์เอกซ์, แมสซาชอูสเอตส แบย โกโลนี, บริตอิช โกโลนิาล อาเมริแค
th.Scituate, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: ชีจ๊ต, ปลีมอูท โกโลนี, บริตอิช โกโลนิาล อาเมริแค
th.London, England: โลนโดน, เอิงแลนด์
th.Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Coloni: แมสซาชอูสเอตส แบย โกโลนี, บริตอิช โกโลนิาล อาเมริแค
th.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: โบสโทะน, แมสซาชอูสเอตส แบย โกโลนี, บริตอิช โกโลนิาล อาเมริแค
